name: Neptune's Surprise
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix all ingredients except the potato chips.
2. Transfer the mixture to a greased casserole dish.
3. Cover and bake for 10 minutes at 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
4. Add the potato chips on top of the mixture.
5. Return the dish to the oven and bake for an additional 20 minutes, or until heated through.
